title: Make Blur - Perfect Background Blur for iPhone
description:
📸 Fix portrait mode, blur faces for privacy, or get creative with 7 blur styles - all in seconds! #iPhone #PhotoEditing #Privacy #MakeBlur
https://MakeBlur.com/
topic:
App: Make Blur
Tagline: Blur background and faces on iPhone in seconds
Audience: iPhone users who want portrait-style background blur, creative photo effects, or privacy-safe sharing without complicated editors
Problem: Portrait mode only works on some shots, other blur apps are paywalled or confusing, and you need to blur backgrounds or faces before posting group photos
Features: Auto-detect background blur in seconds; Face blur for privacy on group shots; Seven blur styles: Bokeh, motion, Gaussian, ghosting, pixelate, hexagonal, crystalize; Custom brush to blur exactly where you want; Freemium — core tools free, optional in-app purchases
Platforms: iOS
Website (optional in CTA/caption): https://MakeBlur.com/
Extra angle from user: background blur app
